title: About the molecular cutting of the prog knife
display_title: About the molecular cutting of the prog knife
wikitext:
[]: About the molecular cutting of the prog knife             Quote Post by Ogbunabali » Fri Feb 26, 2021 10:29 am Where exactly is that mentioned? Both here and on the Fandom wiki it's listed that the prog knives can cleave objects at the molecular level, however it's not sourced in either page. And I've also went through a decent amount of Eva material but I haven't encountered anywhere where this is stated.

[]: Re: About the molecular cutting of the prog knife             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Fri Feb 26, 2021 11:04 am You can find this on Evangelion Chronicle: Evangelion Chronicle wrote: A high-frequency wave is sent through the blade, causing it to vibrate and allowing it to slice through objects at the molecular levels.

[]: Re: About the molecular cutting of the prog knife             Quote Post by Ogbunabali » Fri Feb 26, 2021 11:24 am I see. Thank you very much.
